archimate:DataObject.name: Geospatial High Value Dataset
archimate:DataObject.documentation:
Description: This dataspace comprise INSPIRE themes, reference parcels, and agricultural parcels
Publisher: European Comission- Directive 2019/1024
Source: https://eur-lex.europa.eu/legal-content/EN/TXT/PDF/?uri=CELEX:32019L1024
LOST view: SV-Business Agnostic High Value Dataset
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/GeospatialHighValueDatasetDataObject
EIRA concept: eira:SolutionBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/GeospatialHighValueDatasetDataObject
Interoperability Layer: Semantic
Realises: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/DataSetCatalogueDataObject

properties.value: This dataspace comprise INSPIRE themes, reference parcels, and agricultural parcels
